role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund invests in financial instruments that ProShare Advisors believes, in combination, should produce daily returns consistent with the daily target. It seeks to benefit from decreases in the price of bitcoin futures contracts for a single day. The index is designed to measure the performance of a single bitcoin traded in USD and seeks to provide a proxy for the bitcoin market. It is non-diversified.
